_meta.name: gadmin-list-apps
_meta.description: Navigate to Google Admin Apps section and perceive all configured apps. Includes SAML apps and OAuth apps.
_meta.author: session-2026-04-14
anomalies: Apps section has sub-sections: Web and mobile apps, Google Workspace, Additional Google services
SAML apps appear under Web and mobile apps — look for YeshID here to confirm SSO integration

chain.note: Navigate to Web and mobile apps — SAML apps are here
Perceive apps list. Look for YeshID SAML app, Okta, or other SSO providers. Report all app names, types (SAML/OIDC/OAuth), and status.
